plan.user_question: What percentage of occupied housing units has housing costs at or above 50 percent of income?

derived_recodes.purpose: Record the approved deterministic threshold used by the numerator

result.generated_sql: SELECT "b"."TENURE" AS "TENURE", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= 50)) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND NOT ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (-6, -7, -8, -9)))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_missing_y_n" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" WHERE ("b"."INTSTATUS" = 1) GROUP BY "b"."TENURE" ORDER BY "TENURE" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 101
result.parameterized_sql: SELECT "b"."TENURE" AS "TENURE", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= ?)) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= ?)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND NOT ((("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL) AND ("b"."TOTHCPCT" NOT IN (?, ?, ?, ?)))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_missing_y_n" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" WHERE ("b"."INTSTATUS" = ?) GROUP BY "b"."TENURE" ORDER BY "TENURE" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 101

formulas.missing_value_rule: Numerator is evaluated within the denominator after declared missing-value exclusions.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

metadata.weight_eligibility_rule: weight IS NOT NULL AND weight > 0
metadata.arithmetic_rule: DuckDB DECIMAL(18,6) component sums; final ratios rounded HALF_EVEN to 6 decimal places

variance.message: Descriptive weighted estimates only. Standard errors, confidence intervals, and significance tests are unavailable until replicate weights and an approved variance method are implemented.
